title: gentiana decorata subsp. leucantha
intro: Gentiana decorata subsp. leucantha is a rare, alpine plant species in the Gentianaceae family, characterized by its unique white or pale yellow flowers and tall, slender stem. Traditionally, Gentiana decorata subsp. leucantha is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Gentiana decorata subsp. leucantha can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
